title: Slow Cooker Chicken Tortilla Soup
description: Dump-and-go soup using Costco rotisserie chicken and pantry staples. Set it in the morning, eat it for dinner.

instructions.text: Shred the rotisserie chicken, discarding skin and bones.
Add chicken, broth, diced tomatoes, black beans, corn, onion, garlic, cumin, and chili powder to the slow cooker.
Cook on low for 6-8 hours or high for 3-4 hours.
Stir in lime juice just before serving.
Ladle into bowls. Top with crushed tortilla chips, shredded cheese, avocado, and sour cream.

storageInstructions: Refrigerate up to 5 days. Freezes beautifully for up to 3 months — freeze without toppings.
leftoverIdeas: Reduce the soup and use as a burrito filling
Pour over rice for a soup-and-rice bowl
